test.create_query: CREATE TABLE dedup_null ( id UInt32, datetime DateTime, category LowCardinality(String), value1 UInt64, value2 UInt32, value3 UInt16, ts1 DateTime, counter1 UInt32, counter2 UInt32, counter3 UInt32, counter4 UInt32, counter5 UInt32, status UInt8, amount Decimal64(2), ratio Float64, ts2 DateTime64(3), tag FixedString(8), name String, tags Array(UInt32), nullable_val Nullable(UInt64), pair Tuple(UInt32, UInt64), kv Map(String, UInt32) ) ENGINE = Null

CREATE TABLE dedup_mt ( id UInt32, datetime DateTime, category LowCardinality(String), value1 UInt64, value2 UInt32, value3 UInt16, ts1 DateTime, counter1 UInt32, counter2 UInt32, counter3 UInt32, counter4 UInt32, counter5 UInt32, status UInt8, amount Decimal64(2), ratio Float64, ts2 DateTime64(3), tag FixedString(8), name String, tags Array(UInt32), nullable_val Nullable(UInt64), pair Tuple(UInt32, UInt64), kv Map(String, UInt32) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY () PARTITION BY toYYYYMMDD(datetime) SETTINGS non_replicated_deduplication_window = 1000
test.query: INSERT INTO dedup_null SELECT number, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 86400), ['a','b','c','d','e'][number % 5 + 1], rand(), number % 1000000, number % 65535, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 43200), number % 100000, number % 200000, number % 300000, number % 400000, number % 500000, number % 256, toDecimal64(number % 100000, 2), number / 1000000.0, toDateTime64('2024-01-01', 3) + toIntervalMillisecond(number % 86400000), toFixedString(toString(number % 99999999), 8), concat('name_', toString(number % 10000)), [number % 100, number % 200, number % 300], if(number % 10 = 0, NULL, number % 50000), tuple(number % 1000, number % 100000), map('key', number % 1000) FROM numbers(5000000) ORDER BY ALL SETTINGS deduplicate_insert='{dedup_mode}'

INSERT INTO dedup_mt SELECT number, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 86400), ['a','b','c','d','e'][number % 5 + 1], rand(), number % 1000000, number % 65535, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 43200), number % 100000, number % 200000, number % 300000, number % 400000, number % 500000, number % 256, toDecimal64(number % 100000, 2), number / 1000000.0, toDateTime64('2024-01-01', 3) + toIntervalMillisecond(number % 86400000), toFixedString(toString(number % 99999999), 8), concat('name_', toString(number % 10000)), [number % 100, number % 200, number % 300], if(number % 10 = 0, NULL, number % 50000), tuple(number % 1000, number % 100000), map('key', number % 1000) FROM numbers(5000000) ORDER BY ALL SETTINGS deduplicate_insert='{dedup_mode}'

INSERT INTO dedup_mt SELECT number, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 86400), ['a','b','c','d','e'][number % 5 + 1], rand(), number % 1000000, number % 65535, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 43200), number % 100000, number % 200000, number % 300000, number % 400000, number % 500000, number % 256, toDecimal64(number % 100000, 2), number / 1000000.0, toDateTime64('2024-01-01', 3) + toIntervalMillisecond(number % 86400000), toFixedString(toString(number % 99999999), 8), concat('name_', toString(number % 10000)), [number % 100, number % 200, number % 300], if(number % 10 = 0, NULL, number % 50000), tuple(number % 1000, number % 100000), map('key', number % 1000) FROM numbers(5000000) ORDER BY ALL SETTINGS deduplicate_insert='{dedup_mode}', insert_deduplication_token='perf_test'
